description: Raw data downloaded from GEO (GSE213216). 54 samples in tar.gz format. Total size ~15.7GB.
Per-sample QC: filtered cells with ≥500 genes and ≤20% mitochondrial reads. All genes retained. 43 samples successfully processed (2 failed due to missing raw matrix).
Combined all 43 filtered samples into a single AnnData object. Total cells: ~283,000 (exact sum to be calculated). Genes: 33,538. Added sample metadata column 'tissue_type' (currently unknown).

scVI-VAE trained on combined AnnData (epoch 400, ELBO: -1842.3). Latent dim d=20, batch covariate = sample ID. Model saved before RAM crash — paired with all_samples_combined_scvi.h5ad v0.4.0. Use together for latent representation extraction.

Final QC applied to combined data: cells with ≥1000 total counts, ≤20% mitochondrial reads, ≤8000 genes detected (to exclude multiplets). Retained 247,990 cells and 38,224 genes (no gene filtering). scVI model (v0.3.0) used to compute latent representation (batch_key='sample') stored in .obsm['X_scVI']; UMAP computed from latent space (neighbors + umap). No clustering applied. Raw counts preserved. Denoised expression can be materialised per gene subset.

Surface marker lists generated by intersecting all genes in v0.4.0 with the Surfaceome database (Bausch-Fluck et al. 2018). Outputs: full metadata (surfaceome_in_atlas.csv), CSPA-validated shortlist (surfaceome_in_atlas_CSPA_validated.csv), and plain gene list (marker_shortlist.txt). These are used for subsetting before denoised expression extraction.
Enhanced h5ad with cell type annotations (CellTypist, Human Endometrium Atlas) and patient metadata scraped from GEO. Immune cells flagged, patient IDs added. Built on v0.4.0.

Binarised cell-level data ready for differentiable optimisation. Derived from v0.6.0 by subsetting to surface markers and binarising posterior expression estimates (threshold >0.5 per 10k). Stored as sparse numpy arrays. Two versions: with and without patient IDs for stratified sampling.
